titleStmt.title: SII 23.285: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 285. (A.R. No. 285 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—in the same place Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 14: 1130-31 A.D.

summary.p: This commences with the praśasti Pūmādu Puṇara etc. It records a gift of 12 kāśu for a perpetual lamp in the temple by Āṇḍapiḷḷai-yāṇḍār a devotee of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat taṉ tirupatumalar maṉnavar cūṭa maṉniya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaito
ṟum Aḷappa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭarmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭappa Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru koṭai niḻaṟkiḻ mukko
kkiḻānaṭakaḷoṭum virasimhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koppara kecaripatmarāna tribhuvanacakravarttikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 14 Āvatu Āṭimāsattu
muṉṟān tiyatimutal śrīpatiyil kumpiṭṭirukkum Āṇṭapiḷḷaiyāṇṭār Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyārkku cantirātittavaṟ palicai cekuttu tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟu Eri
vatāka tevakaṉmikaḷvacam Oṭukkina kācu 10 2 paṉniraṇṭum panmāyeśvarara kṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
